summary: Add five TidyCal workflow commands for schedule briefs, triage, availability proposals, follow-up queues, and confirmation-gated assisted booking.
reason: The generated endpoint mirror exposes raw TidyCal operations, but agentic scheduling needs composed read-only views and an inspectable booking workflow built on real endpoints.
validated_outcome: go test ./..., go build ./..., structural dogfood, publish validate, and full live dogfood passed after adding workflow examples and UTC booking-window query parameters.
